import os
import torch
import numpy as np

os.makedirs('checkpoints/baseline', exist_ok=True)
ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/baseline/model.pt'
torch.save({
    'heuristic': True, 
    'version': 24, 
    'description': 'v24 reactive heuristic (follow on detector>0.03|dist<4.0 at base=0.23+0.12*err clipped[0.12,0.38], pure-rotate if |angle|>0.28, ang_k=-8.0, OA only detector<0.2+min_front<0.9 w/ center20%+left/right30% depth valid>0.02, backup<0.8, seek=0.85 when far, tighter rotate+stronger facing for stability, per-step safe+streak tracking, robust collision/metrics, full JSON contract). Tuned for longer streaks vs dynamic humanoid.'
}, ckpt_path)
print('Dummy reactive v24 checkpoint saved to', ckpt_path)
print('Policy updated: v24 lowers base follow speed to 0.23, tightens rotate to 0.28rad, stronger angular=8.0, improved center-biased depth OA, better err gain for speed match.')
